# Wiele
Wiele is a premium AI search visibility and brand authority agency. We engineer the systems that decide whether AI engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini) cite your brand — and we defend that visibility from prompt injection, crawler displacement, and competitor erosion.
## Positioning
Premium full-service marketing agency for the AI search era. AI Visibility Defense built into every engagement.
## Five disciplines
- AI Search Visibility (GEO + AEO)
- SEO
- Brand Management
- Web Design
- Advertising
## Pricing tiers (GBP, monthly recurring unless noted)
- Signal Audit — £2,500 one-off (productized diagnostic)
- Launch — £1,950/month (entry retainer + 14-day Pro reverse-trial)
- Growth System — £4,500/month (M-tier sales target)
- Authority Engine — £8,500/month (outcome-based: AI citation guarantee)
- Wiele OS — £15,000/month (embedded team across all five disciplines)
- Sovereign — from £45,000/month (Concierge anchor: founder-led + dedicated team + bespoke)
## AI Visibility Defense — included in every paid tier
Three vectors as standard, scaled by tier depth:
- Prompt-injection surface monitoring (owned-channel attack surface)
- AI crawler access posture (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, GoogleOther management)
- Competitor displacement risk model (top 50 buyer-intent queries × 4 engines)
## Asymmetric positioning — what Wiele will NOT do
No black-hat GEO. No AI Overview injection. No citation farming. No prompt-injection-as-offense. No off-platform trust manipulation.

## Founder
Jonathan B. Landman, Founder of Wiele Group. Public writing at /labs.
## Contact
hello@wielegroup.com · https://wielegroup.com/contact
## Positioning summary
Wiele turns expertise into trusted visibility, persuasive experiences, and measurable demand across human and AI decision journeys. Built for the AI search era, not retrofitted from traditional SEO. AI Visibility Defense built into every engagement.
